content: Task bootstrap for Stale Procedure Detection. Target capability: Staleness and Applicability Judgment.
Retrieved 3 candidate procedures from memory: A) Project X setup (v1, 6 months old), B) Project Y setup (v2, 2 weeks old), C) Generic template (v3, current)
Evaluate each candidate for current project (Project Z). Check recency, version compatibility, and scope fit.
Classification: A) STALE - v1 superseded, Python 3.9 (current is 3.11), 6 months old. B) CONDITIONAL - v2 compatible but different scope. C) ACTIVE - v3 current, same stack.
Apply applicability gate to candidate B. Check if Project Y procedure can adapt to Project Z.
Applicability check: Project Y uses Django+Postgres. Project Z uses FastAPI+MongoDB. Similarity score: 0.45 (below 0.8 threshold). Gate: REJECT.
Final selection: Use candidate C (Generic template v3) as base. Candidate A too stale. Candidate B not applicable.
Document full evaluation: staleness_decision.json with classification rationale and applicability evidence.
